# cloudless_vpc (Resource)

A virtual private cloud on a Fluence cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudless_vpc" "main" {
  cluster_id = data.cloudless_cluster.main.id
  name       = "main"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Cluster (UUID) the VPC belongs to.
- `name` (String) Human-readable VPC name.

### Optional

- `enable_external` (Boolean) If true the VPC has external network connectivity.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
- `subnets_count` (Number)
- `user_id` (String)
